winning_test.source:
import pytest

from gradebook.analytics import letter_grade


def test_score_79_is_a_c_not_a_b():
    assert letter_grade(79) == "C"
winning_test.targeted_behavior: At the exact lower boundary for a B, 79 remains a C; the mutation incorrectly promotes it to B.
